items.claim: John Port is clean, technical, has good footwork, and is defensively sound.
items.quote: He's clean, he's technical, he's got good footwork, and he's defensively sound.

items.claim: Volkan Oezdemir has won his last four UFC fights by submission in round one.
items.quote: Volkan Oezdemir by submission in round one, which again has happened in his four UFC wins, back-to-back-to-back-to-back.

items.claim: Axel Sola's opponent has been finished by KO/TKO several times and didn't like the pressure in his last fight.
items.quote: His opponent has been finished by KO/TKO several times. Didn't like the pressure from Chris Taku Pedie in his last fight. Is going to hate the pressure from Axel Sola.

items.claim: Sam Patterson can get knocked out.
items.quote: You don't see Sam Patterson's name in there, cuz that fool can get knocked out. We've seen it.

items.claim: Dustin Jacoby should be the better striker in a mostly striking match.
items.quote: Dustin Jacoby, who I do think wins his fight. Should be the better striker in a mostly striking match.
